targets.invoke: Use $mbti-typing to run a rigorous multi-round MBTI typing interview.
targets.contract: Codex skill plus repository AGENTS.md contract.
Project skill and slash-command fallback for Claude Code.

targets.invoke: Ask Cursor to use the MBTI Typing Skill rule, or mention @mbti-typing.
targets.install: Keep .cursor/rules/mbti-typing.mdc committed in the project root.
targets.contract: Project rule in MDC format plus AGENTS.md fallback.

targets.invoke: opencode run "Use the MBTI Typing Skill to distinguish ENTJ vs INTJ"
targets.install: Keep AGENTS.md and opencode.json committed in the project root.
targets.contract: AGENTS.md project rules with opencode.json instructions aggregation.
